aweme_list.desc: SAVE 💾: FULL BREAKDOWN BELOW ⤵️ (Like❤️ + Share 🚀) Dreaming of owning a home? The Yorkshire Building Society's new scheme could be your key! With just a £5,000 deposit, this is a great option for first-time buyers who might not have a huge saved deposit yet. Here's the breakdown: • Minimum deposit: £5,000 • Maximum property value: £500,000 • Exclusively for first-time buyers • Only applies to certain property types (not new builds or flats) • Interest rate: 5.99% Important! Do your research to see if this scheme aligns with your financial goals and property needs. It's always wise to consult a mortgage advisor for personalised guidance. Tag a friend who's been saving for a house! If this has been helpful, SAVE this for later + drop a COMMENT below ⬇️ Follow 👉🏾 @PropertyByJewels for more valuable content on all things Property 🏘️💰 Save For Later 💾 Share With A Friend 🚀 Like + Comment ❤️✍️ #property #ukproperty #ukpropertymarket #ukpropertyinvestment #propertyinvestoruk #propertydevelopment #like #follow #trending #propertyinvesting #firsttimebuyersuk #realeastate #mortgagetips #homeownership #financialgoals  #FirstTimeBuyer #YorkshireBuildingSociety #PropertyLadder #homeownership

aweme_list.desc: Just announced! 📣 Yorkshire Building society have just introduced a £5k deposit mortgage for first time buyers to help them get the start they need! 😁 Available for properties up to a max value of £500k, dont know many first time buyers buying at thet level!  And subject to affordability, and credit checks. ✅  If you need a broker to help, message and I will connect you to the best. ⭐️ Love a bit if good news and so much more achievable to save for. 😍 #buyingahome #firsttimebuyer #mortgages #yorkshirebuildingsociety #propertyladder #dundee
